issues.detail: The skill lacks explicit, step‑by‑step instructions, leaving users uncertain about how to apply the guidance.
Only a few error scenarios are demonstrated; the skill does not address a broad range of edge cases.
The explanatory text contains some verbose sections that could be trimmed for brevity.

scenarios.name: Mock payment failure rollback test
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses vi.mock at top level for both modules, vi.mocked(...).mockRejectedValueOnce for the failure case, and asserts sendEmail was not called; baseline mixes jest-style patterns and omits the rollback negative assertion.

scenarios.name: CI coverage threshold configuration
scenarios.rationale: Treatment configures coverage.provider v8 with thresholds for lines/branches/functions in vitest.config.ts and runs `npx vitest run --coverage` plus installs @vitest/coverage-v8; baseline gives generic coverage config without vitest-specific keys.
